title: Animal Hats
description: A bunch of hats based on the mobs from Minecraft. Inspired by *Adventure Time*.
body:
With plentiful hats based on various mobs from Minecraft, you can have your own adventure and pretend to be a certain teenage hero

There are currently 27(twenty-seven) hats based on the many passive mobs from Minecraft, with a bunch more on the way!

A perfectly cute cosmetic that'll make you stand out among your friends!![wearing the frog hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bcc15a39de5bed517c9edcb5d292153ca8ec77.png)
